name: create_photo_collage_photoshop
goal_template: Create a {photo_count}-photo collage in Adobe Photoshop at {width}x{height}px, arrange images in a grid with a border colour of {border_color}, and export as {format}

steps.intent: Open Photoshop and create a new canvas at the target dimensions
steps.target_desc: File > New — set width, height, resolution, RGB mode

steps.intent: Fill the background layer with the border colour
Place the first photo as a Smart Object
steps.target_desc: File > Place Embedded — select photo file 1

steps.intent: Resize and position photo 1 in its grid cell, then commit
steps.target_desc: transform handles drag + Enter to confirm

steps.intent: Repeat Place Embedded for each remaining photo
steps.target_desc: File > Place Embedded — repeat for photos 2..N

steps.intent: Select all photo layers and distribute them evenly
steps.target_desc: Align and Distribute buttons in the Options bar

steps.intent: Add a drop shadow layer style to each photo layer
Add a text label or title if desired
steps.target_desc: Type tool (T) — click canvas and type title

steps.intent: Export the final image in the specified format
steps.target_desc: File > Export > Export As — choose format and quality

steps.intent: Save the layered PSD source file

success_checks: Exported image file exists at the chosen path in the correct format
All photos are visible and correctly positioned with even gaps
Background colour shows as a consistent border between photos
Layered .psd source file is saved for future edits
